meta.title: Eduardo Bachosky | Portfolio
meta.description: Full Stack Developer — projects, experience and contact.

hero.name: Eduardo Bachosky
hero.role: Full Stack Developer · React · Next.js · TypeScript

about.title: About
about.bio:
My name is Eduardo, I’m 22 years old and I’m a Full Stack Developer passionate about Information Technology and Cybersecurity. I’m a curious and motivated professional who loves exploring new technologies, solving problems, and learning continuously. I have hands-on experience designing and developing web systems in both academic and professional projects.

I work with modern stacks and tools, always aiming to build efficient and secure solutions. I’m also deeply interested in cybersecurity, which adds an extra layer of care to the systems I help create.
about.educationValue: B.S. in Systems Analysis and Development — Faculdade SENAC, Ponta Grossa, PR, Brazil.

calpar.description:
Sole frontend owner of a large-scale logistics management system, responsible for all UI development, maintenance, and technical documentation.

• Implemented a real-time notification system by translating a WebSocket-based backend architecture into a seamless frontend experience.

• Maintained a complex multi-role authentication system with WhatsApp-based OTP and role-specific token flows.

• Refactored project documentation using Docusaurus, keeping UI release notes and README consistently up to date.

• Delivered incremental feature releases on a weekly cadence in a production environment.

unimed.description:
Led end-to-end development of three internal systems serving HR, operations, and finance teams across a large healthcare organization, working in an agile environment with direct stakeholder contact.

• Built a real-time employee offboarding platform from scratch, integrating with legacy HR systems (Senior, E-Social) via automated database routines. Included a custom-built dynamic form engine with versioning, multi-step flows, LGPD-compliant consent tracking, and geolocation logging, driving data-driven policy changes across the organization.

• Automated offboarding survey delivery via WhatsApp using Kafka-based scheduling and Syngoo, authenticating ex-employees by registered phone number, a key factor in achieving high response rates.

• Developed a facilitator directory system that replaced a complex spreadsheet, improving cross-department communication and simplifying project intake across the company.

• Delivered a PIX payment feature for self-service IoT kiosks built with Flutter/Dart, a framework learned in one week, reducing physical invoice printing by ~80–90% and virtually eliminating payment failures. Presented results directly to IT leadership.

compass.description:
Participated in the company's talent development program focused on AWS cloud certification (AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner).

• Gained hands-on experience with AWS cloud services, cloud security best practices, and environment configuration and management.

• Developed skills in Agile methodologies, cloud infrastructure, and security monitoring.

fortnite.title: Fortnite Jam Tracker
fortnite.description: A platform to search and explore songs from Fortnite, with search by track name, artist and album, plus in-browser audio previews. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Prisma and Neon.

sneaker.title: Sneaker Tracker
sneaker.description: A sneaker collection manager where users can track and organize their favorite pairs. Built with Next.js, TypeScript and PostgreSQL.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: This portfolio — built from scratch with locale detection, a language switcher, and dark/light theme support. Fully typed with TypeScript and styled with Tailwind CSS.

packpull.title: PackPull
packpull.description: A cross-platform desktop app that automates Minecraft modpack downloads by parsing a manifest.json file. Built with Vite, Electron and React.
